sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ponce Financial: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. (PDLB) reported a net income of $8.6 million for its first quarter, with a profit of 36 cents per share. The company, headquartered in the Bronx, N.Y., also announced revenues of $50.7 million, with adjusted revenues reaching $30.3 million. This financial update indicates the company's performance for the quarter.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Mostapha Tahiri Sells Shares of State Street Corp (STT)
feed.summary: Mostapha Tahiri, EVP and COO of State Street Global Advisors, sold 9,611 shares of State Street Corp (STT) on April 22, 2026, reducing his holding to 64,642 shares. This transaction is part of a trend for State Street Corp, which has seen 21 insider sells and only 1 insider buy over the past year. With the stock trading at $152.93 against a GF Value of $109.53, it is considered significantly overvalued.

feed.title: Regulators make big changes to We Energies data center rate plan, give preliminary approval
feed.summary: The Wisconsin Public Service Commission has given preliminary approval to a modified rate plan for We Energies' data centers, following a year-long review. This decision addresses projects like Microsoft's Mount Pleasant campus and Vantage Data Centers' Port Washington site. The changes aim to regulate the energy consumption of these large facilities.

feed.title: Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) stock sinks as market gains: What you should know
feed.summary: The Archer Daniels Midland Company's stock (ADM) experienced a decline while the broader market saw gains. The article briefly notes this performance disparity.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies Inc. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies Inc. (TYL) stock rose 1.87% on Friday, closing at $342.03, yet still underperformed compared to its competitors. The S&P 500 Index saw an increase of 0.80%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a slight fall of 0.16%. Despite the daily gain, TYL stock is significantly below its 52-week high.

feed.title: Nio launches special edition ES8, Onvo L80 debut set for Apr 28
feed.summary: Nio launched the Mirrorblack Edition of its ES8 SUV at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show, priced at 456,800 yuan. The company also announced the debut of its sub-brand Onvo's L80 five-seat SUV, with pre-sales starting April 28. This move, along with new product launches like the upcoming ES9, aims to maintain sales growth and navigate industry challenges, contributing to Nio's recent financial turnaround and achieving its first-ever quarterly profit in Q4 2025.

feed.title: PTC Therapeutics CEO Matthew Klein sells $202,093 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: PTC Therapeutics CEO Matthew Klein sold 2,850 shares of the company's common stock for $202,093 on April 21, 2026. This "sell to cover" transaction was executed to fulfill tax withholding obligations tied to the vesting of restricted stock units. Following the sale, Klein directly owns 394,070 shares, while the company prepares for its earnings report on May 7, 2026, and navigates ongoing analyst ratings and regulatory developments.

feed.title: Paycom Software Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
feed.summary: Paycom Software Inc. (PAYC) shares fell by 1.42% to $123.72 on Friday, marking its fourth consecutive day of losses. Despite this, the stock outperformed the broader market, as the S&P 500 Index rose by 0.80% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.16% during a mixed trading session.

feed.title: VanEck BDC Income ETF Offers High Yield Alternative to Private Credit
feed.summary: The VanEck BDC Income ETF (BIZD) provides a more transparent, publicly traded alternative to private credit for investors seeking high yields. While private credit can suffer from liquidity risks and opaque valuations, BIZD offers access to middle-market lending strategies with its $1.6 billion in assets and a yield potential near 10%. However, investors should be aware of layered costs and broader economic dependencies.

feed.title: NexGel receives Nasdaq notice for minimum bid price deficiency
feed.summary: NexGel, Inc. (NASDAQ:NXGL) has received a deficiency letter from Nasdaq due to its common stock trading below the minimum $1.00 bid price for 30 consecutive business days. The company has 180 calendar days to regain compliance, with a potential extension if other listing standards are met. NexGel is considering options, including a reverse stock split, but offers no assurance of resolving the deficiency.

feed.title: State Street (NYSE:STT) COO Mostapha Tahiri Sells 9,611 Shares
feed.summary: State Street's COO, Mostapha Tahiri, sold 9,611 shares of company stock for approximately $1.47 million, reducing his stake by 12.94%. This sale comes after State Street reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.84 per share, translating to an annualized yield of 2.2%.

feed.title: Petrobras (NYSE: PBR) details phantom share balance for product chief
feed.summary: Petrobras's Chief Product Officer, William Franca Da Silva, has updated his phantom share holdings, now totaling 285.52 phantom shares tied to PETR3 common shares. These shares are part of the Petrobras Performance Award Program, settled in cash upon vesting, and increase proportionally with company dividends or interest on equity. The reference price for these shares is $10.49, based on a conversion from BRL to USD on April 22, 2026.

feed.title: Insider Selling: United Rentals (NYSE:URI) CEO Sells 22,768 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: United Rentals CEO Matthew Flannery sold 22,768 shares of the company's stock for approximately $22.43 million, reducing his ownership by 18.55%. This sale occurred following the company's Q1 earnings report, which missed revenue and EPS estimates but also included an announcement of a $5.0 billion share repurchase program and a quarterly dividend of $1.97, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts despite some intraday stock weakness.

feed.title: Petrobras (PBR) chief engineering officer reports 81.15 phantom share holding
feed.summary: Petrobras's Chief Engineering Officer, Renata Faria Rodrigues Baruzzi Lopes, reported an updated holding of 81.15 phantom shares as part of the company's Performance Award Program. These phantom shares are referenced to PETR3 common shares, settled in cash upon vesting, and accrue additional units when Petrobras distributes dividends or interest on equity. The reference price for these shares is $10.49, based on a PETR3 closing price of 52.07 BRL and an exchange rate of 4.9647 BRL per USD on April 22, 2026.

feed.title: [Form 4] PETROBRAS - PETROLEO BRASILEIRO SA Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Clarice Coppetti, Chief Corporate Affairs Officer of PETROBRAS - PETROLEO BRASILEIRO SA (PBR), reported updated holdings of phantom shares. These phantom shares are linked to PETR3 common shares and were credited as a result of a dividend payment on April 22, 2026, under the Petrobras Performance Award Program. The awards are settled in cash upon vesting, with deferred portions vesting in four equal annual installments, and also receive proportional credits for dividends or interest on equity.

feed.title: PCB Bancorp (PCB) Q1 EPS Lift Challenges Cautious Profitability Narratives
feed.summary: PCB Bancorp (PCB) reported strong Q1 2026 results with a 42.5% earnings increase and a 34.2% net profit margin, challenging cautious profitability narratives despite a multi-year earnings decline. The company's lower cost-to-income ratios suggest improved efficiency, although increased non-performing loans raise concerns about credit quality. PCB's valuation shows a lower P/E ratio compared to peers and a positive DCF fair value, indicating a potential discount amidst moderate growth forecasts.

feed.title: Plug Power Revenue Beat Sparks Rethink On Growth Versus Ongoing Risks
feed.summary: Plug Power (NasdaqCM:PLUG) reported a 17.6% year-on-year revenue increase, exceeding expectations, which has led to increased investor interest and a significant stock price gain. Despite this recent positive momentum and strong revenue growth for its hydrogen solutions, the company remains loss-making with a high net income margin and faces risks such as a short cash runway and recent dilution. Investors are now evaluating how this improved revenue and sentiment will impact the company's long-term prospects.

feed.title: Is PDF Solutions Inc (PDFS) Overvalued After 6.1% Rally? GF Valu
feed.summary: PDF Solutions Inc (PDFS) shares recently rallied 6.1%, but GuruFocus' GF Value™ indicates the stock is Modestly Overvalued at $46.49, against an intrinsic value estimate of $41.67. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 75/100, driven by financial strength and momentum, the company shows weaknesses in profitability and growth. Investors are advised to be cautious due to the potential for limited upside and increased risk of decline.

feed.title: PDF Solutions amends credit agreement, expands revolving facility to $75 million
feed.summary: PDF Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:PDFS) has amended its credit agreement, increasing its revolving credit facility to $75 million through an agreement with Wells Fargo Bank. The amendment also introduces a tiered commitment fee structure based on the company's total debt to EBITDA ratio, replacing a flat fee. This development follows the company's strong fourth-quarter 2025 earnings, which exceeded Wall Street expectations and led DA Davidson to raise its price target.

feed.title: Brazil's Petrobras to raise jet fuel prices to distributors by 18% in May, reports Valor
feed.summary: Brazilian state-run oil firm Petrobras is set to increase the average price of jet fuel sold to distributors by 18% starting May 1, according to local newspaper Valor Economico. This follows a 54.8% hike in April due to rising oil prices linked to the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran, with Petrobras allowing distributors to pay the increase in installments. The company adjusts jet fuel prices monthly based on factors like oil prices and currency exchange rates.

feed.title: Ocular Therapeutix (OCUL) Is Up 8.2% After Positive Phase 3 AXPAXLI Data and FDA Feedback - What's Changed
feed.summary: Ocular Therapeutix (OCUL) shares increased by 8.2% following positive Week 52 data from its Phase 3 SOL-1 trial for AXPAXLI, showing superior durability and sustained disease control in wet AMD patients. The company also received FDA feedback supporting a single-trial approval pathway, which could expedite the NDA filing. This development significantly strengthens Ocular Therapeutix's investment narrative, with an upcoming Investor Day expected to clarify regulatory timing, cash runway, and commercialization plans.

feed.title: Onto Innovation Inc (ONTO) Stock Up 5.3% but GF Value Says Overv
feed.summary: Onto Innovation Inc (ONTO) shares rose 5.3% but are deemed significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus' GF Value, trading 81.0% above its estimated intrinsic value. Despite a strong GF Score of 87/100, driven by excellent Financial Strength and Growth ratings, the Valuation score is low at 3/10, indicating the stock is overpriced. Insider transactions have been neutral, with no recent buying or selling activity reported.

feed.title: [Form 4/A] Uber Technologies, Inc Amended Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article details an amended insider trading activity for Uber Technologies, Inc. (UBER) by officer Andrew Macdonald. The Form 4/A filing corrects a previous report regarding shares withheld for tax purposes upon RSU vesting, noting an administrative error led to over-withholding. Following this adjustment, Macdonald directly holds 338,387 shares of Uber common stock, characterizing the transaction as a routine, non-market tax event.

feed.title: Oppenheimer moves to end cash sweep case with $70M deal before trial
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. (OPY) has agreed to a binding term sheet to settle a class-action lawsuit concerning its cash sweep program for $70 million. This settlement aims to resolve claims exceeding $440 million asserted by plaintiffs and will significantly impact the company's Q1 2026 earnings, being fully reserved in that quarter. The agreement is subject to court approval and explicitly states no admission of liability from Oppenheimer.

feed.title: Is Teradyne Inc (TER) Overvalued After 4.3% Rally? GF Value Says
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc (TER) shares recently rallied 4.3%, contributing to a significant 442.9% increase over the past year. Despite this strong performance, GuruFocus' GF Value™ indicates the stock is 195.2% overvalued at $418.08 against a fair value of $141.62. This overvaluation is further supported by a P/E ratio of 120.1x, well above its 5-year median, and recent insider selling, suggesting potential risks for investors.

feed.title: MINISO Group Holding Ltd (MNSO) Stock Up 3.4% and Still Underval
feed.summary: MINISO Group Holding Ltd (MNSO) shares rose 3.4% to $15.08, despite a 17.6% year-to-date decline. GuruFocus categorizes MNSO as "Significantly Undervalued" with a GF Value™ of $32.68, indicating potential upside. The company has an above-average GF Score™ of 68/100, driven by strong profitability and growth, though valuation and momentum ranks are low.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies Inc (LHX) Shares Fall 3.9% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies Inc (LHX) shares dropped 3.9% to $317.51, marking a significant decline despite a strong performance over the last year. According to GuruFocus' GF Value, the stock is considered "Modestly Overvalued" as its current price is 25.4% above its intrinsic value of $253.10. Insider selling totaling $4.8 million also indicates a potential lack of confidence in the stock's short-term prospects.

feed.title: NexGel Receives Nasdaq Deficiency Notice Over Bid Price
feed.summary: NexGel (NXGL) has received a Nasdaq deficiency notice because its common stock traded below the $1.00 minimum bid price for 30 consecutive business days. The company has until October 19, 2026, with a possible extension, to regain compliance by having its closing bid price at or above $1.00 for ten consecutive business days. Failure to comply could lead to delisting, and NexGel may consider a reverse stock split as a measure to restore its share price.

feed.title: Ncino Inc (NCNO) Shares Surge 4.2% -- What GF Score of 67 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Ncino Inc (NCNO) shares surged 4.2% to $17.68, placing it significantly below its GF Value™ of $37.21, suggesting a 52.5% undervaluation. The company's GF Score™ is 67/100, indicating above-average quality, primarily driven by a strong growth rank, but tempered by lower profitability and valuation ranks. Insider selling of $2.1 million over the past three months without any purchases raises a bearish signal for investors.

feed.title: [Form 4] QUEST DIAGNOSTICS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics Executive Vice President & CFO Sam Samad reported an acquisition of 108 common shares on April 20, 2026, at $194.698 per share. This transaction, involving restricted share units and a dividend reinvestment plan, increased his direct holdings to 33,376 shares. The filing indicates Samad chose to report this early on Form 4, rather than deferring to a Form 5.

feed.title: VeriSign Falls After Q1 Beat as .Com Price Hike Puts Renewal Risk in Focus
feed.summary: VeriSign reported strong first-quarter results with increased revenue and profit, driven by higher .com and .net registrations, and subsequently raised its 2026 forecast. However, the stock declined after the company announced plans to hike its wholesale .com domain prices, raising investor concerns about potential impacts on renewal rates and registrar pricing dynamics. Analysts have mixed views, with some increasing price targets while others maintain neutral ratings, highlighting the potential double-edged sword of price adjustments.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) SVP adds 37 shares through dividend reinvestment
feed.summary: Mark E. Delaney, SVP & Chief Commercial Officer at Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX), acquired 37 shares of the company's common stock on April 20, 2026, through a dividend reinvestment plan. This transaction, reported via a Form 4 filing, added to his direct holdings, which now total 11,901 common shares. The acquisition was executed at $194.696 per share and is considered a small transaction under Rule 16a-6.

feed.title: Multiple insider sales reported by The Charles Schwab Corp (MTSI) via Form 144
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing indicates proposed sales of Common shares of The Charles Schwab Corporation by Susan Ocampo, identified as Founder Shares. The filing lists multiple scheduled dispositions between February 3, 2026, and April 21, 2026, including significant amounts like 200,000 shares on March 2, 2026, and 100,000 shares on April 13, 2026. This type of filing is a routine notice of proposed sales by an affiliate and does not confirm completed transactions.

feed.title: Nuwellis Settles Lawsuit With E.F. Hutton, Resolving Dispute
feed.summary: Nuwellis (NUWE) has settled a lawsuit filed by E.F. Hutton & Co. for an alleged breach of an exclusive placement agent engagement. The company agreed to pay $204,000 without admitting liability, and Hutton committed to dismissing the lawsuit with prejudice. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates NUWE as Neutral due to weak financial fundamentals and bearish technicals, despite some operational improvements and financing activities.

feed.title: Psyence Group Inc. Announces Amendment to Amalgamation Agreement with GoldCoast Resource Corp.
feed.summary: Psyence Group Inc. has announced an amendment to its amalgamation agreement with GoldCoast Resource Corp., primarily affecting the formula for the consolidation of Psyence Shares. This revision accounts for lapsed time and aims to reflect the relative equity values of both companies at closing, with the final consolidation ratio dependent on variables determined before closing. The transaction, still subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, is expected to see Psyence continue as the resulting issuer, carrying on GoldCoast's business of near-shore mineral exploration.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Extending Its 50-Year Dividend Growth Streak
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) recently extended its 50-year dividend growth streak with a 7% increase for 2026, signaling management's confidence in its cash flow generation. The company's investment narrative focuses on margin expansion through its 80/20 Front-to-Back Process, rather than rapid top-line growth, with GAAP EPS guidance of US$11.00 to US$11.40. While the dividend reinforces ITW's image as a resilient industrial dividend payer, investors should also consider potential pressures on organic growth in certain segments.

feed.title: Is Genuine Parts (GPC) Pricing Misaligned With Cash Flow Value After Recent Share Pullback
feed.summary: Simply Wall St analysis suggests that Genuine Parts (GPC) is currently undervalued based on its discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis, trading at a significant discount to its estimated intrinsic value of $198.13 per share. The company's current P/S ratio of 0.61x is also below both the industry average and its estimated "Fair Ratio" of 1.05x, further indicating a potential undervaluation for the stock. This assessment comes after a period of share price volatility and declines for GPC.

feed.title: Corning Incorporated Just Opened a Financing Door After Its AI Stock Surge
feed.summary: Corning (NYSE: GLW) has filed an automatic shelf registration for various securities, including debt and stock, providing financing flexibility ahead of its first-quarter earnings call on April 28. This move comes as the company's stock is near all-time highs due to its involvement in AI data-center optics and a significant fiber-optic deal with Meta Platforms. While the filing offers options for future fundraising without immediate action, it also carries risks such as potential dilution for existing shareholders or increased debt obligations.

feed.title: A Look At ConocoPhillips (COP) Valuation As Renewed Interest Follows Favorable Fundamentals And 2026 Spending Plans
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) is seeing renewed investor interest due to its strong return on equity, lower debt, higher dividend yield, and a significant US$12 billion capital spending plan for 2026, targeting an expanding LNG portfolio and large liquefaction projects. The stock has shown substantial growth, and a popular narrative suggests it is 12% undervalued, with a fair value of $138 per share driven by future cash generation from gas demand. Despite trading at a higher P/E ratio than its industry peers, the market reportedly sees underlying value while pricing in execution and commodity risks.

feed.title: Ball Corporation Isn't Prepared For An Upgrade Yet (NYSE:BALL)
feed.summary: Ball Corporation (BALL) is currently rated a Hold due to its fair valuation compared to peers despite recent strong performance. The company reported significant revenue and net income growth in 2025, driven by higher aluminum prices and volumes, and projects over 10% EPS growth for 2026. Upcoming Q1 2026 results are anticipated to further shape the investment outlook for Ball Corporation.

feed.title: Neonc technologies CFO Keithly Garnett buys $1,614 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Keithly Garnett, CFO of NEONC TECHNOLOGIES HOLDINGS, INC. (NASDAQ:NTHI), recently purchased 300 shares worth $1,614 at $5.38 per share. Despite the purchase, the stock is down 11% from his buying price and 46% over the last six months, with InvestingPro indicating it's in oversold territory. Garnett now directly holds 241,200 shares and indirectly owns 44,053 shares through HCWG LLC. This comes amid other company news including a $16 million private placement, new analyst coverage with a "buy" rating, a new Chief Accounting Officer, settlement of a legal dispute, and plans to present initial clinical trial data in March 2026.

feed.title: Climb Global Solutions Announces Board Change as Director Retires
feed.summary: Climb Global Solutions (CLMB) announced that director Gerri Gold will retire after the 2026 annual meeting and will not seek re-election. Her departure is not due to any disagreement, and the board plans to reduce its size from five to four directors. This change is considered a routine governance streamlining with limited immediate impact on the company's strategic direction.

feed.title: New York Times (NYSE: NYT) director gets 2,277 RSUs grant
feed.summary: New York Times Company director Rachel C. Glaser was granted 2,277 stock-settled restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of her director compensation. These RSUs, which vest at the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, represent a contingent right to receive Class A Common Stock. After this grant, Glaser's direct holdings amount to 35,778 shares, and vested shares will be delivered within 90 days after she leaves the Board.

feed.title: New York Times (NYSE: NYT) director granted 2,277 RSUs, now holds 20,343 shares
feed.summary: New York Times Company director Manuel Bronstein was granted 2,277 stock-settled Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), increasing his direct holdings to 20,343 shares. This equity award, granted under the 2020 Incentive Compensation Plan, is part of his director compensation and not a market purchase. The RSUs will vest on the date of the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, with shares delivered within 90 days after he leaves the Board.

feed.title: NY Times (NYT) director Brooke receives 2,277 RSUs as board award
feed.summary: NEW YORK TIMES CO director Beth A. Brooke was granted 2,277 Class A share equivalents as equity compensation in the form of stock-settled restricted stock units. These RSUs, which vest on the date of the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, represent a contingent right to receive one share of Class A Common Stock each. After this transaction, Brooke directly holds 22,099 Class A shares, and vested shares will be delivered within 90 days after her board service concludes.

feed.title: NYT (NYSE: NYT) director receives 2,277 stock unit award
feed.summary: New York Times Company director Margot Golden was granted 2,277 stock-settled restricted stock units under the company's 2020 Incentive Compensation Plan. These units vest on the date of the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, and the shares will be delivered within 90 days after her service on the Board concludes. Following this grant, Golden directly holds 10,044 Class A shares, in addition to indirect holdings through trusts for which she disclaims beneficial ownership beyond any pecuniary interest.

feed.title: New York Times (NYSE: NYT) director receives 2,277 restricted stock units
feed.summary: New York Times Company director Anuradha B. Subramanian was granted 2,277 stock-settled restricted stock units under the company's 2020 Incentive Compensation Plan. These units, which were awarded at $0.00 per share, represent a contingent right to one share of Class A Common Stock each. The units will vest on the date of the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders, and vested shares will be delivered within 90 days after Subramanian's service on the Board of Directors ends, bringing her total holdings to 11,899 Class A Common Stock-related units and shares.

feed.title: Director at NEW YORK TIMES CO (NYSE: NYT) granted 2,277 RSUs
feed.summary: John W. Rogers Jr., a director at NEW YORK TIMES CO (NYSE: NYT), was granted 2,277 stock-settled restricted stock units (RSUs) under the company’s 2020 Incentive Compensation Plan. These RSUs, valued at $0.00 per share, will vest on the date of the next Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Following this grant, Rogers directly holds 54,492 Class A shares, and the vested shares will be delivered within 90 days after his service on the Board of Directors ends.

feed.title: First Trust MISL ETF Becomes Strategic Choice for Defense Investors
feed.summary: The First Trust Indxx Aerospace & Defense ETF (MISL) is highlighted as a strategic investment for defense due to its focus on critical weapons systems and munitions. Analysts predict sustained demand for defense stocks for over a decade, driven by the need to replenish depleted global stockpiles. Although MISL's recent performance has been flat, its long-term potential is strong because of its alignment with future Department of Defense requirements.

feed.title: Nuvve Faces Imminent Nasdaq Delisting After Bid Price Breach
feed.summary: Nuvve Holding Corp. (NVVE) is facing imminent delisting from Nasdaq due to failing to meet the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement for 30 consecutive trading sessions. The company is ineligible for the standard grace period because of multiple reverse stock splits in the past two years. Nuvve plans to appeal the delisting decision, which would temporarily stay the suspension, though there's no guarantee of regaining compliance or continued listing, posing significant risks for shareholders.
